title: Realm Quest: Adventure Awaits
description: a modpack that promises challenging dungeons, mysterious lands, and exciting encounters. Are you ready to test your skills?
body:
[Code BLU3 at checkout for 15% off first month](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=330)

![CODE BLU3 AT CHECKOUT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f11e54f8aef120c2cad7b93953a2abdd20f3dad.png)

This modpack promises:
- challenging dungeons
- mysterious lands
- and exciting encounters. 

Prepare to Explore:
- Mysterious dimensional doors
- uncover hidden treasures
- battle formidable foes
- and discover the secrets of the realm.


Are you ready to test your skills?

No mob is friendly any more and will attack you if provoked.
Mysterious portals have opened up EVERYWHERE so gear up and explore them for loot good or bad
Villagers now offer you quests to tackle with a loot pool that may be worth something (or not).

You can now respawn in the end and theres a true end boss to fight.

The overworld has been Overhauled to include new villages and underground suprises!
